messages.content: These risk write-ups share funnel target nodes, which does NOT make them the same risk — a funnel is coarse, so mechanistically distinct risks (a certification clock, a grid-connection queue, a distributor line-review cycle) can all compile to the same node. PARTITION the cluster into groups of TRUE duplicates: same underlying mechanism, same causal story, such that presenting both to a client would read as repetition. Distinct risks come back as singleton groups (absorbs: []). For a genuine duplicate group, pick the best exemplar (sharpest mechanism, best evidence) as keepId and fold the absorbed write-ups' UNIQUE early-warning indicators into it. Over-merging destroys distinct insights — when in doubt, keep them separate.

content: {"rationale":"Three distinct mechanisms appear, each with a duplicate pair. (1) Intelligent-subset scope inflation: the product sells intelligent PDUs but the base counts all rack PDUs — 'intelligent-subset-inflation' and 'boundary-substitution.intelligent-subset-scope-mismatch' are the same causal story. (2) Stock-vs-flow apportionment error: PDU revenue follows fit-out flow but base uses standing stock — 'stock-vs-flow-intensity-mismatch' and 'structure-independence.stock-weighted-tam-misses-fitout-flow' are identical. (3) The unsourced Europe≈30% hop: 'europe-30pct-arithmetic-ghost' and 'ledger-self-audit.europe-thirty-percent-arithmetic-ghost' both attack the inserted regional share; the self-audit version adds the global-anchor contest but same core mechanism, so merge. Three duplicate groups, no singletons.","groups":[{"keepId":"risk.definition-scopedown.intelligent-subset-inflation","absorbs":["risk.boundary-substitution.intelligent-subset-scope-mismatch"],"foldedIndicators":[{"signal":"Published intelligent-vs-total rack-PDU revenue split for EU or Germany","where":"IndexBox EU/Germany Intelligent Rack PDUs report headlines; Omdia Rack PDU Annual Market Analysis abstract updates","threshold":"Intelligent share reported below 70% of category revenue","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"SKU mix stocked and quoted by CE distributors (basic vs metered vs switched/intelligent)","where":"CE electrical/IT distributor price lists and catalogs (e.g., Rexel, Also/Ingram DC-infrastructure lines)","threshold":"Basic+metered-only SKUs constituting the majority of listed rack-PDU line items","updates":"increases"}]},{"keepId":"risk.definition-scopedown.stock-vs-flow-intensity-mismatch","absorbs":["risk.structure-independence.stock-weighted-tam-misses-fitout-flow"],"foldedIndicators":[{"signal":"Directly-scoped EU rack-PDU country revenue data","where":"IndexBox EU Rack PDUs report country tables (the ledger's own pending source); Omdia vendor-share regional cut","threshold":"CE-7 revenue share reported below 35% of Europe","updates":"increases"}]},{"keepId":"risk.ledger-self-audit.europe-thirty-percent-arithmetic-ghost","absorbs":["risk.definition-scopedown.europe-30pct-arithmetic-ghost"],"foldedIndicators":[{"signal":"Europe regional revenue share in any rack-PDU-specific report vintage","where":"Grand View rack-PDU report regional segmentation; IndexBox world benchmark report vs EU report headline ratio","threshold":"Europe stated or derivable at <27%","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"EMEA vs Americas vs APAC rack-power revenue mix in incumbent disclosures","where":"Vertiv 10-K segment reporting; Legrand annual report data-center line commentary","threshold":"EMEA rack-power consistently <25% of global segment revenue","updates":"increases"}]}]}
